data.name: Legacy of Epstein: Noncompliance
data.detailed_description:
STORY

After receiving a distressing message, J. Epstein must escape Escondido to help a fellow traveler. Precluding the events of the other two games (Bad Omen, Foul Dreamer), explore the origins of the J. Epstein story and unravel the truth of what the hell is going on.

GAMEPLAY

Explore the open world to find items and complete quests in order to escape the seemingly unescapable city. Run, jump, scheme, and sleuth. Escape at all costs, and if you can, find the truth...

FEATURES

  • Collect Junko Slops and expand your collection.

  • Explore the open streets of Escondido... The world is your sandbox.

  • Dabble in diabolical side quests.

  • Memes and jokes (laughs not guaranteed).


GENRE

Open World Comedy Exploration with Memes

data.short_description: Scandal strikes the nation and J. Epstein is in the thick of it. What follows is a web of mystery that exposes the institutions that are rotten to the core. Who's compromised?
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or Later
  • 處理器: 2.33GHz or faster x86-compatible
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1080 or equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or Later
  • 處理器: 2.33GHz or faster x86-compatible
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 3060 or equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
